note: push 実行前の Etsy 上の内容

4540223324.title: Japanese Summer Events Sticker Sheet – August | Printable PNG & Editable PDF
4540223324.description:
Celebrate summer in Japan with a beautifully illustrated collection of traditional festivals, seasonal activities, and nostalgic summer motifs.

This August sticker sheet includes 35 original watercolor-style designs featuring fireworks, Bon Odori, Tanabata decorations, floating lanterns, festival games, summer foods, stargazing, and more.

Included files:
- Transparent PNG: 3072 × 2048 px, 300 DPI
- One-page printable PDF
- 35 individual transparent PNG stickers
- 31 editable Japanese and Romaji event labels

Only the event-name labels are editable in the PDF. All illustrations, frames, titles, bonus stickers, and concept artwork are fixed raster graphics.
For best results, print at “Actual Size” or 100%.

4539870476.title: Japanese Summer Flowers – July Sticker Sheet | 35-Piece Botanical Collection
4539870476.description:
A charming collection of Japanese summer flowers, illustrated in a delicate watercolor style. This July edition includes 31 botanical stickers—one for each day of the month—plus four seasonal bonus designs featuring a goldfish bowl, wind chime, fireworks, and a special “Japanese Summer Flowers – July” concept sticker.

Each flower sticker includes its Japanese name and Romanized pronunciation. The carefully spaced 7 × 5 layout makes every piece easy to cut out by hand.
